Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The scenario describes a process with activities: SS, OP, RC, QI, CA, PT, PK, WS, DT, AS. The process as described is sequential: SS -> OP -> RC -> QI -> CA -> PT -> PK -> WS -> DT -> AS.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In a linear sequence, for a trace SS, OP, RC, QI, CA, PT, PK, WS, DT, AS, the pairs are all combinations where the first appears before the second. So there are 10 activities, so number of pairs = C(10,2) = 45.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to generate plausible numbers based on typical supply chain durations. Typical durations: Supplier Selection SS several days, Order Placement OP 1 day, Receive Components RC 14 days, Quality Inspection QI 1 day, Component Assembly CA 3 days, Product Testing PT 2 days, Packaging PK 1 day, Warehouse Storage WS 5 days, Distribution DT 2 days, After-Sales Support AS months.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The timestamps are completion times. The time between A and B is completion time of B minus completion time of A. For consecutive A B, if B starts immediately after A finishes, interval equals duration of B.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Define consecutive interval averages and standard deviations in seconds: SS-OP: avg 21600 stdev 3600, OP-RC: 1209600 259200, RC-QI: 86400 21600, QI-CA: 86400 21600, CA-PT: 172800 43200, PT-PK: 86400 21600, PK-WS: 86400 21600, WS-DT: 432000 86400, DT-AS: 2592000 604800.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Produce representative subset: all 9 consecutive pairs, plus 8 non-consecutive pairs from SS to RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS, total 17 pairs to ensure complexity with pairs separated by multiple steps.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each pair, average time is sum of consecutive averages along the path, standard deviation is sqrt of sum of variances of those consecutive intervals. Compute for SS-RC: avg 1231200 stdev 259225, SS-QI: 1317600 260123, and similarly for others.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Verify plausibility: relative standard deviations around 15-25 percent for consecutive pairs, for cumulative pairs decreases slightly as expected since dominated by largest variance components, total SS-AS 55 days avg with 7.7 days stdev reasonable.
